original: just barely notice another nyrea attempting to stab you in the back. You quickly spin around and shove her back, preventing the attack.
fail to notice one of their sisters behind you grabbing a dagger and leaping to attack you, sinking the dagger into
You manage to grab her spear before it can hit you, and you quickly snap the head off, tossing the poison aside.

You try and dodge, but her sisters give you no room to maneuver; you end up getting sliced by it! Hissing with pain, you recoil and grab your bloodied [pc.skinNoun]... and quickly begin to feel the poison boiling through you, making your body burn with unbidden arousal.
The chemical in your blood is getting stronger!
\nYou dodge out of the way, narrowly avoiding a crushing blow.
\nYou don’t manage to dodge in time, and get a thunderous wallop on the head for your trouble! You stagger back, clutching your aching head.
